# Foundry Services
# Foundry Services
Chip Foundry
Chip Foundry
While some need to go overseas for their chips, we walk across the street.
While some need to go overseas for their chips, we walk across the street.
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/GBMrHdqQzNc37uydLZVTHbVsTk.jpg?width=1024&height=768)
## Custom chip  
fabrication
## Custom chip  
fabrication
Wafer-level processes from single to multi-layer structures.
Wafer-level processes from single to multi-layer structures.
The SEEQC [foundry](https://seeqc.com/foundry-services) is the premier commercial foundry for superconducting IC’s and custom fabrications. It provides services to fabricate the world’s most complex superconductor electronics and provides a unique capability to support the [quantum computing](https://seeqc.com/technology) R&D community.
As part of SEEQC’s Hypres legacy, the facility has fabricated more than 5,000 separate superconductive electronic [chip](https://seeqc.com/technology) designs. The foundry can produce virtually any superconductor chip for commercial, academic, and government markets; and offers design, development, simulation, layout, fabrication, cryogenic high-speed testing and packaging in a world-class production environment.
The SEEQC [foundry](https://seeqc.com/foundry-services) is the premier commercial foundry for superconducting IC’s and custom fabrications. It provides services to fabricate the world’s most complex superconductor electronics and provides a unique capability to support the [quantum computing](https://seeqc.com/technology) R&D community.
As part of SEEQC’s Hypres legacy, the facility has fabricated more than 5,000 separate superconductive electronic [chip](https://seeqc.com/technology) designs. The foundry can produce virtually any superconductor chip for commercial, academic, and government markets; and offers design, development, simulation, layout, fabrication, cryogenic high-speed testing and packaging in a world-class production environment.

## Our services
## Our services
Our state-of-the-art, 150mm wafer processing capability is supported with advanced equipment in manifold clean rooms. The high-volume capability allows customers to take advantage of rapid improvements in both yield and performance.
We provide complex superconductor chip fabrication services to governments and leading business and academic organizations around the world. For a customer list and references, please Contact Us.
Our state-of-the-art, 150mm wafer processing capability is supported with advanced equipment in manifold clean rooms. The high-volume capability allows customers to take advantage of rapid improvements in both yield and performance.
We provide complex superconductor chip fabrication services to governments and leading business and academic organizations around the world. For a customer list and references, please Contact Us.
### Superconducting planarized multi-layer process
Standard process with multi-project wafers or dedicated wafers. Applicable for Josephson junction circuits including SFQ digital and mixed-signal circuits, analog Josephson circuits, SQUIDs, etc.
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/tFv7hceB0oDUkmWssYUgVnu7NA.jpg?width=1362&height=1362)
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/tFv7hceB0oDUkmWssYUgVnu7NA.jpg?width=1362&height=1362)
Superconducting planarized multi-layer process
Read more
Our Services
### Superconducting sensor process
Including TES, SNSPDs Nanofabrication services to incubate custom processes from startup to pre-production stage
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/AePdsubtRYLw1gZ8Y7O2Oz2OQq4.jpg?width=1362&height=1362)
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/AePdsubtRYLw1gZ8Y7O2Oz2OQq4.jpg?width=1362&height=1362)
Superconducting sensor process
Read more
Our Services
### Superconducting and non-superconducting multi-chip module processes
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/5zLKjxsMn9KDSncVnxbyJSskQ.jpg?width=1362&height=1362)
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/5zLKjxsMn9KDSncVnxbyJSskQ.jpg?width=1362&height=1362)
Superconducting and non-superconducting multi-chip module processes
Read more
Our Services
### The Niobium Process
The Seeqc foundry features a complete niobium-based superconducting integrated circuit fabrication line. The niobium process has proven reliability as demonstrated by circuit operations through 7,000 thermal cycles without failure and no changes in device characteristics after five years of shelf life.
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/hIG3W75wQUkzjkp7IiwxraJcE.jpg?width=1362&height=1362)
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/hIG3W75wQUkzjkp7IiwxraJcE.jpg?width=1362&height=1362)
The Niobium Process
Read more
Our Services
### Standard Process
Niobium technology (Nb, NbNx)
Critical current density
Available critical current densities: 100, 1000, 4500, 10000 A/cm2
Fast turnaround time
Typically six weeks for 4 Nb-layer process, eight weeks for 6 Nb-layer process
High-density circuits with multi- superconducting layers
4, 5, 6, 8 Resistor layer material and sheet resistance: Mo: 1.0 Ω/□, 2.1 Ω/□, PdAu: 2.1 Ω/□, MoNx: 4.0 Ω/
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/zJ4776KYuO4OQxhMpnIIgxCIDGM.jpg?width=1362&height=1362)
Standard Process
Read more
Our Services
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/zJ4776KYuO4OQxhMpnIIgxCIDGM.jpg?width=1362&height=1362)
### Interlayer dialect
  * PECVD SiO2 and low-loss SiNx
  * Proven high-volume production
  * Demonstrated yield and reliability
  * Use of Seeqc proprietary simulation tools and device models, optimized sub-circuits
  * Availability of standard sub-circuits and layout primitives
  * Flip-chip bonding with superconducting and non-superconducting bumps


![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/Rc8lRBhYuYX4Yl6gSBhDlEXBwo.jpg?width=1362&height=1362)
Interlayer dialect
Read more
